name: Bengo4.com,Inc.
summary: Bengo4.com,Inc. primarily develops and operates legal search and consultation portal site in Japan. It also develops and operates sites for tax consultation, legal news media, legal advice, web-complete cloud contract service, corporate legal affairs, and career consulting and career change support services, as well as for business support and customer support service for tax accountants. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
